/CAL:BAIL MOTION/MO GRTD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT ENTER INTO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT THE LATINO COMMISSION AND ALSO CHECK IN WITH ACM 1 TIME PER WEEK BY PH0NE/WS/WEAP/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/CONTD:STATUS OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT/DOPU:IF IN TREATMENT/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:STATUS OF M99 22001099/X:M99 HOLD LIFTED AND DEFENDANT HAS A FELONY ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 12 TODAY AT 130PM/GTWM/CONTD:DEPT 12 FORCUSTODY STATUS ON 02-10-22/DOPC/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/

/CAL:EC 1043 BRADY MOTION/NP/X: NINA SARIASLANI IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/ /X: PEOPLE'S REQUEST TO JOIN MOTION IS GRANTED/X: PRODUCTION OF RECORDS FORTHWITH, RELEVANT MATERIAL LODGED WITH THE COURT TODAY WITH AND IN CAMERA REVIEW WITH THE COURT BY 1-26-22/X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:TRIAL/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 01-12-22/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/VD:TRIAL AND LAST DAY/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/FTRRECORDED/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:12-10-21/ACM/X:PARTICIPATE AND ATTEND ANGER MANAGEMENT COURSES/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 11-17-21 AND JURY TRIAL ON 12-01-21/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT/
/CAL:STATUS OF RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM, PROOF REQUIRED/DAWT/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 14/DAWF/X:FUTURE DATE OF 07-22-22 IS CONFIRMED/
